name: delete_dashboard_gadgets
short_description: Deletes the gadgets from project summary dashboard
full_help:
delete_dashboard_gadgets

Description: 
Deletes the gadgets from project summary dashboard

Syntax: 
delete_dashboard_gadgets  [-quiet] [-verbose] <gadgets>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <gadgets>   Gadgets to delete

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
